content.rendered:
The Embedded World 2026 Exhibition & Conference provides a global platform and meeting place for the entire embedded community, including leading experts, key players and industry associations. It offers unprecedented insight into the world of embedded systems, from components and modules to operating systems, hardware and software design, M2M communication, services, and various issues related to complex system design.

Visit AMI at Booth 5-243 in Hall 5 of the Nuremberg Messe throughout the event for an exciting and informative lineup of demonstrations and the latest innovations in AMI firmware solutions for embedded, edge and IoT systems.
